subcodes.first_line: O ye who are sincere! O ye who are enraptured! O ye who are steadfast in the Covenant and Testament!
subcodes.first_line_orig: ایها المخلصون ایها المنجذبون ایها الثابتون علی العهد و المیثاق الحمد لله راه مسدود مفتوح گشت
subcodes.subjects: @greatness and influence of the Cause; of this Day, @parliaments; constitutional government, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @praise and encouragement, @call to action, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @power of love
